title: What Machiavelli thought freedom actually was - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Ada Palmer on historical interpretations of Machiavelli's political philosophy, specifically examining what Machiavelli understood freedom to mean. The discussion explores Renaissance political thought and its conceptions of liberty.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer on Machiavelli's political philosophy, centering on what freedom meant in his thought. The conversation situates that concept within Renaissance political ideas and their conceptions of liberty. The takeaway is a historically grounded reading of Machiavelli, drawing on how his era understood freedom rather than later interpretations.
